title: $UNIFIELD_NO_CR_KTT
text: $UNIFIELD_NO_CR_KTT Specify that the carriage return (CR) character in a multi-line Unifield does not go through the keyboard translation table. $UNIFIELD_NO_CR_KTT Defaults Assignment file: client assignment files Section: [SETTINGS] Default value: None Description Use this assignment setting to specify that the CR character (Enter key) does not go through the keyboard translation table. For backward compatibility, this restores older functionality. Without this assignment setting, the CR character goes through the keyboard translation table and can therefore be remapped.
